nasb.text: Speak and say, ‘Thus says the Lord God, “Behold, I am against you, Pharaoh king of Egypt, The great monster that lies in the midst of his rivers, That has said, ‘My Nile is mine, and I myself have made it.’

esv.text: speak, and say, Thus says the Lord God: “Behold, I am against you, Pharaoh king of Egypt, the great dragon that lies in the midst of his streams, that says, ‘My Nile is my own; I made it for myself.’

cnv.text: 你要說：‘主耶和華這樣說： 埃及王法老啊！我要與你為敵， 你這臥在自己河中的大海怪， 你曾經說過：“這河是我的，是我自己造的。”

ccb.text: 你要告诉他，主耶和华这样说， “‘埃及王法老啊， 你这躺卧在自己河中的大怪物， 我要与你为敌。 你说这尼罗河属于你， 是你为自己造的。
